CONTENT.Career: Bondarenko is a product of the different youth sportive schools, who signed a professional contract with FC Shakhtar Donetsk in the Ukrainian Premier League in 2020.He played in the Ukrainian Premier League Reserves and made his debut for Shakhtar Donetsk in the Ukrainian Premier League in a losing match against FC Vorskla Poltava on 1 March 2020.
CONTENT.Honours: IndividualTop scorer: 2018–19 Ukrainian Premier League U-19 competitions
CONTENT.External links: Artem Bondarenko at SoccerwayArtem Bondarenko at UAF and archived FFU page (in Ukrainian)
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played on 9 June 2023

SUMMARY: Artem Yuriyovych Bondarenko (Ukrainian: Артем Юрійович Бондаренко; born 21 August 2000) is a Ukrainian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Shakhtar Donetsk in Ukrainian Premier League.
